svg.title: Derived Standard Model charge map
svg.desc: A Standard Model-style grid showing solver-derived hypercharges and electric charges for fermions, plus input boson data and consistency notes.
svg.text: The familiar particle grid, but Q and Y are generated from anomaly cancellation, Yukawa gauge invariance, and Q = T3 + Y/2.
Masses and spins are inputs; exact values are not SM-derived here.
2 solutions: u_R and d_R can swap
mu decay uses a W tree; mu -> e
